发布作品后，请务必把链接填到对应投稿方向的问卷！填写后才能参与后续评选和发奖。

thread_title: 🔥10000银芯奖励！V2.3.4 UGC创作征集开启！10,000 Silver reward! V2.3.4 UGC Creation Submission Campaign Launched!

content:
一片、两片、三片…黑色的羽毛被细心收纳在箱子里，再收集10片羽毛就能为波吕克斯制作一对翅膀。

🔍10片羽毛散落在各处：评论区、聊天频道、帖子……守密人一起帮忙找回这些羽毛吧！

🎁在本条帖子评论区留下你找到的羽毛，集齐10根后将将在明天解锁全服奖励：内含无垢之芯×50、蔷薇金券×1000000

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

One, two, three... Black feathers are carefully stored in a box. Collect 10 more, and a pair of wings can be crafted for Pollux.

🔍These 10 feathers are scattered everywhere: in the comments, chat channels, posts... Keeper, let's work together to retrieve them!

🎁Post the feathers you've found in the comments! Once 10 feathers have been collected, a server-wide reward will be unlocked tomorrow : Pure Core×50, Rose Scrip×1000000.
thread_title: 🐦 奔逃的双生鸟：折翼的雏鸟与珍藏的羽毛┊Running Fledglings: Broken Wings and Cherished Feathers
